steps.title: Spot the key clue about timing
steps.content: The passage emphasizes the dodder flowers “at the same time” as the host plant. This signals we need a word meaning to align or coordinate the timing of two things.

steps.title: Match synchronization to the passage's scenario
steps.content:
”The tiny dodder achieves this synchronization with its host” describes the dodder timing its flowering to match the host's bloom — the exact mechanism the passage describes. The other three choices (hibernation is dormancy, prediction is forecasting, moderation is restraint) describe concepts that have nothing to do with this mechanism.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
